Auria Update

Wenqing Chen
07.05.2025

t-CyCIF

Scimap spatial interaction

It’s hard to see the spatial interaction differences within different tumor subtype

Log2FC analysis for each two groups

Paired t-test to do significant analysis, because we have 9 images, and each image provides all tumor subtypes

t-CyCIF

Scimap spatial interaction

t-CyCIF

Tumor GCLC_VIM subtype by RCNs

scRNA-seq

Oxstress high VS low

scRNA-seq

GCLC+VIM+ VS GCLC-VIM-

It’s a bit more fuzzy, cannot show what we want (transition from the differences in cell state of the G+V+ to the clinical outcomes)

Suggestion from Nomeda:
anastasis signature
proliferation score

scRNA-seq

Anastasis signature score

reversal of apoptosis—a phenomenon where cells that had initiated programmed cell death recover and survive.

scRNA-seq

Anastasis signature score

A molecular signature for anastasis, recovery from the brink of apoptotic cell death - PubMed
Antigenic cancer persister cells survive direct T cell attack - PubMed

Get the anastasis signatures
“From Figure 4C of the source publication; the top 41 'early-response' genes upregulated by Hela-EtOH, H4-EtOH, and Hela-STS.”

Calculate scores
“Expression of a signature was determined using the Seurat ‘AddModuleScore’ function and Mann-Whitney nonparametric tests were utilized to compare signature scores between groups.”

reversal of apoptosis—a phenomenon where cells that had initiated programmed cell death recover and survive.

scRNA-seq

Anastasis signature score

Note: LOC284454, LOC644656, LINC00673, not searching for symbol synonyms

scRNA-seq

Anastasis signature score

Note: LOC284454, LOC644656, LINC00673, not searching for symbol synonyms

Higher score means:
Increased potential for apoptosis reversal
Therapy resistance
Poor prognosis

scRNA-seq

Proliferation signature score

Antigenic cancer persister cells survive direct T cell attack - PubMed

Get the anastasis signatures
From Nomeda: 129 signatures

Calculate scores
R: Seurat ‘AddModuleScore’ function and Mann-Whitney nonparametric tests were utilized to compare signature scores between groups.
Python: ‘sc.tl.score_genes’ function & Mann-Whitney nonparametric tests

scRNA-seq

Proliferation signature score

Seurat ‘AddModuleScore’

‘sc.tl.score_genes’

Note: GYPA, CDC2, SFRS2, CDC45L, DDX39, ORC6L, ERAF, C21orf45, MLF1IP, BZRPL1, not searching for symbol synonyms

scRNA-seq

Proliferation signature score

Conclusion

t-CyCIF:
The spatial interaction results show: GCLC+VIM+ tumor cells have higher interaction with immune cells, however, we cannot define it’s tumor-immune co-localization or immune evasion. I need to find a good way to check. (because when I calculate log2FC, I have to use absolute values)

scRNA:
From the anastasis and proliferation signature score analysis, comparison between Tumor_GCLC+VIM+ and Tumor_GCLC-VIM+, both GCLC+VIM+ tumor cells have higher scores, means rapid tumor cell division, therapy resistance and poor prognosis…
